title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 26 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 26 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 26 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/03/2026
Dalian iron ore futures experienced an early session increase before gradually retreating throughout the day.The most-traded I2605 contract ultimately closed at 817 RMB per tonne, marking a modest gain of 0.18% from the previous trading session. In the physical portside market, spot prices rose by approximately 5-8 RMB per tonne compared to the previous day. However, sentiment among traders for offering cargo was moderate, while steel mills maintained a measured pace of procurement, resulting in limited overall transaction volumes in the spot market.
